rulings.Case Title: BRIAN SMYTH AND BEN HUTCHINSON VS. ANNE KIHAGI

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 17, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF BRIAN SMYTH, BEN HUTCHINSON's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-553236 WITH CASE CGC-15-546973 GRANTED. Actions are consolidated and CGC-15-546973 shall be the lead case. = (501/NJL)

rulings.Case Title: JESSE FOWLER VS. RAVI SADARANGANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Ravi Sadarangani, Farallon Real Estate Fund 5 Llc Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 17, 2017, line 3. Defendant Ravi Sadarangani, Farallon Real Estate Fund 5 LLC's Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication Defendant's motion is treated as a motion for judgment on the pleadings and is granted with a 10-day leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of peculiar risk and alter ego. = (501/NJL)

rulings.Case Title: YAMEN ELTAWIL VS. KIRANSINH BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Yamen Eltawil Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 17, 2017, line 6. Plaintiff Yamen Eltawil's Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted re: new defendant, prayer for relief and cause of action for constructive eviction. Motion is denied re: addition of a new Plaintiff, a dissolved corporation. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
